snp2.13:2.0.359: "Pucchāmi muniṁ pahūtapaññaṁ,Tiṇṇaṁ pāraṅgataṁ parinibbutaṁ ṭhitattaṁ;Nikkhamma gharā panujja kāme,Kathaṁ bhikkhu sammā so loke paribbajeyya".
snp2.13:2.0.360: "Yassa maṅgalā samūhatā,Uppātā supinā ca lakkhaṇā ca;So maṅgaladosavippahīno,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.361: Rāgaṁ vinayetha mānusesu,Dibbesu kāmesu cāpi bhikkhu;Atikkamma bhavaṁ samecca dhammaṁ,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.362: Vipiṭṭhikatvāna pesuṇāni,Kodhaṁ kadarīyaṁ jaheyya bhikkhu;Anurodhavirodhavippahīno,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.363: Hitvāna piyañca appiyañca,Anupādāya anissito kuhiñci;Saṁyojaniyehi vippamutto,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.364: Na so upadhīsu sārameti,Ādānesu vineyya chandarāgaṁ;So anissito anaññaneyyo,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.365: Vacasā manasā ca kammunā ca,Aviruddho sammā viditvā dhammaṁ;Nibbānapadābhipatthayāno,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.366: Yo vandati manti nunnameyya,Akkuṭṭhopi na sandhiyetha bhikkhu;Laddhā parabhojanaṁ na majje,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.367: Lobhañca bhavañca vippahāya,Virato chedanabandhanā ca bhikkhu;So tiṇṇakathaṅkatho visallo,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.368: Sāruppaṁ attano viditvā,No ca bhikkhu hiṁseyya kañci loke;Yathātathiyaṁ viditvā dhammaṁ,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.369: Yassānusayā na santi keci,Mūlā ca akusalā samūhatāse;So nirāso anāsisāno,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.370: Āsavakhīṇo pahīnamāno,Sabbaṁ rāgapathaṁ upātivatto;Danto parinibbuto ṭhitatto,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.371: Saddho sutavā niyāmadassī,Vaggagatesu na vaggasāri dhīro;Lobhaṁ dosaṁ vineyya paṭighaṁ,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.372: Saṁsuddhajino vivaṭṭacchado,Dhammesu vasī pāragū anejo;Saṅkhāranirodhañāṇakusalo,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.373: Atītesu anāgatesu cāpi,Kappātīto aticcasuddhipañño;Sabbāyatanehi vippamutto,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya.
snp2.13:2.0.374: Aññāya padaṁ samecca dhammaṁ,Vivaṭaṁ disvāna pahānamāsavānaṁ;Sabbupadhīnaṁ parikkhayāno,Sammā so loke paribbajeyya".
snp2.13:2.0.375: "Addhā hi bhagavā tatheva etaṁ,Yo so evaṁvihārī danto bhikkhu;Sabbasaṁyojanayogavītivatto,Sammā so loke paribbajeyyā"ti.
